title: Nagarudhe Nagarudhe Lyrics Vandhaan Vendraan Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Singer: S Thaman
Lyrics: Na Muthukumar
Song: Nagarudhe Nagarudhe

Nagarudhe Nagarudhe, Indha nimidam nagaruthe
Endhan idhayam padharudhe
Unnai vittu chella vazhikuthe,

Idhayathil kathiyaai nulaikaathe
Ithanai idiyathu porukaathe
Ne thandha ninaivugal marakaathe
Nan irandhaal kooda irakaathe

Idhayathil kathiyaai nulaikaathe
Ithanai idiyathu porukaathe
Ne tharum pirivugal thaangathe
En uyire uyirai vizhagaathe

Dhevadhai unnidam, enna varama ketpen keladi
Dhevadhai unnaiye, varamaai ketpen naanadai
Thoongonaal thookathil 
kanavil ketkum undhan kaaladi...
Enake indha idayveli yendai ....

Idhayathil kathiyaai nulaikaathe
Ithanai idiyathu porukaathe
Ne thandha ninaivugal marakaathe
Nan irandhaal kooda irakaathe

Idhayathil kathiyaai nulaikaathe
Ithanai adi athu porukaathe
Ne tharum pirivugal thaangathe
En uyire uyirai vizhagaathe

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Nagarudhe Nagarudhe'?

The song conveys themes of love and celebration, expressing the joy of being in love and the emotions tied to it.

What is the plot context of the movie 'Vandhaan Vendraan'?

The movie revolves around a young man's journey filled with challenges and romance, where this song plays a pivotal role in showcasing his energetic spirit.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung and composed by Thaman S, who is known for his energetic music style.

When was 'Nagarudhe Nagarudhe' released?

The song was released on July 23, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Nagarudhe Nagarudhe, the vibrant energy of the song reflects the joyous spirit of the protagonist in Vandhaan Vendraan. The lyrics, penned by Na Muthukumar, beautifully capture the essence of love and celebration. This upbeat track evokes feelings of excitement and happiness, making it perfect for festive occasions. The infectious rhythm and Thaman S's powerful vocals create an atmosphere that encourages listeners to dance and celebrate life.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Nagarudhe Nagarudhe from Vandhaan Vendraan is a vibrant anthem that perfectly captures the essence of celebration and energy. With Thaman S's dynamic vocals and catchy beats, this track is sure to get you moving. Experience the infectious rhythm that makes this song a must-listen for any party playlist!
stanzaMeanings: City, city, in this moment, the city is my heart. I can't let you go, I am lost without you.
Don't tie my heart, don't let this pain be too much. Don't forget the memories you gave me, even if I am gone, I can't stay away.
Don't tie my heart, don't let this pain be too much. The separations you give me are unbearable, my life can't bear to lose you.
God, I ask you, will you come to me? God, I ask you, will you come to me? When I sleep, your footsteps echo in my dreams... This heartache is mine...
Don't tie my heart, don't let this pain be too much. Don't forget the memories you gave me, even if I am gone, I can't stay away.
Don't tie my heart, don't let this pain be too much. The separations you give me are unbearable, my life can't bear to lose you.
